name: ucglib-core
description: Trimmed, framework-free core of olikraus/Ucglib (BSD-2-Clause) — device drivers, draw primitives, and font tables. Excludes only the Arduino C++ wrapper (Ucglib.cpp), which unconditionally includes SPI.h and won't compile without the Arduino framework. IOP's Ucglib backend (oneIO/display/ucgSpi.h) talks to this core directly via its own com_cb HAL.
